title: Other Eva Artbooks
wikitext:
[]: Other Eva Artbooks?             Quote Post by iamsynch » Sat Aug 02, 2008 2:50 am Everyone knows Der Monde and Die Sterne, but recently I found official art by Sadamoto (I think, it says ys11 on it) that are part of neither books. Does anyone recognize these images and know where I can buy them? LINKS REMOVED

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Aug 02, 2008 2:58 am Random Hentai? Possibly done by Sadamato?

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sat Aug 02, 2008 5:04 am Well at least it's tasteful.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sat Aug 02, 2008 7:55 am Tasteful at best, this really should not be in this forum. Beware.

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Sat Aug 02, 2008 8:38 am *groan* It's not Sadamoto's! It's just an internet rumor going on since forever. The artwork is similar and the "YS" has everyone going, but the coloring is off and the signature is different as well (not just the added "11"). Some say that's to hide that it's him, but then it'd be stupid to write it at all. My bet is still on Izurumi. He and Mogudan contributed to the book ("N2 bomb!") anyway and he likes purple-haired Hikari as seen in A-five. But some people will always keep saying it's Sadamoto's, probably because they like the idea of (more) "official" Eva Hentai.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Aug 02, 2008 10:57 am Try JPQueen, Madarake, or another second hand Japanese book vendor. While it may not be in stock at any given time, if you check periodically, your desired item should come into stock. Some vendors allow you to create an account and choose out of stock items from their database and indicate that you want to be notified by email as soon as it becomes available. Furthermore, these images are NOT official, although official Evangelion hentai (sadly) does exist.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Aug 02, 2008 1:18 pm you mean...other than Stripping Instrumentality Project?
